opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head feels like it's being squeezed in a band of iron, and it just won't let up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A tight band-like headache has built up over the day and painkillers aren't helping.

symptom_narrative.onset: gradual over ~12 hours during work stress and fatigue
symptom_narrative.character: bilateral, pressing/tightening, non-throbbing band-like pain, moderate
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: like an iron band, won't let up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: stress; NOT worse with routine activity
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mild dislike of noise; NO nausea/vomiting, no light sensitivity, no fever/neck stiffness, no sudden 'worst-ever' onset, no weakness/speech/vision changes, no jaw pain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; high work stress; prolonged screen time

objective_data_offered.value: gradual bilateral band-like pressing pain, not throbbing, not worse with activity
no weakness, speech or vision changes; no neck stiffness or fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported; no formal neuro exam remotely
